case_title: WILLIAMS, XAVIER VS SMITH, PAULA et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, PAULA
DEFENDANT'S OPPOSITION TO PLTF'S MOTION GIVEN TO NORA;
CCSF SHERIFF'S DEPT. ATTEMPTS AT PERSONAL SERVICE, AS TO PAULA SMITH, FILED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,240.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS, XAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, PAULA SMITH, PAULA DBA DEE'S CHILD CARE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, XAVIER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SMITH, PAULA SMITH, PAULA DBA DEE'S CHILD CARE PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTF'S REQUEST TO CORRECT OR VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED. COPY OF DENIAL SENT TO BOTH PARTIES.
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED. NOTICE DEFT'S. HOLDING FOR 15 DAYS. PLAINTIFF PAID $14. FILING FEE.
